# Regex fixtures for skill: executing-plans
# Format: one directive per non-empty, non-comment line.
#   MATCH: <prompt>     — regex from config/default-triggers.json for this skill must match
#   NO_MATCH: <prompt>  — regex must NOT match
# Tested deterministically by tests/test-regex-fixtures.sh (zero LLM cost).
# NO_MATCH lines pin the continue word boundary (disCONTINUEd must not fire)
# and the single-char gap in pick.up (no match across "picks up").

MATCH: execute the plan
MATCH: continue with the next task
MATCH: lets resume where we left off
MATCH: pick up the remaining tasks

NO_MATCH: remove the discontinued feature flag
NO_MATCH: discontinuation of the legacy api
NO_MATCH: the queue picks up speed
